name: Linear
description: Issue tracking and project management for engineering teams. Create, update, and track issues with AI agent automation.

capabilities.name: create_issue
capabilities.description: Create a new issue in a Linear team

capabilities.name: update_issue
capabilities.description: Update an existing issue (title, status, priority)

capabilities.name: get_issue
capabilities.description: Get a Linear issue by ID or identifier (e.g., TEAM-123)

capabilities.name: list_issues
capabilities.description: List issues for a Linear team

capabilities.name: search_issues
capabilities.description: Search for Linear issues by identifier

capabilities.name: add_comment
capabilities.description: Add a comment to a Linear issue

capabilities.name: list_teams
capabilities.description: List all teams in the Linear workspace

demo_actions.label: List teams
demo_actions.description: Show teams in your Linear workspace

demo_actions.label: List issues
demo_actions.description: Show recent issues for your team
